ab: mamaha su’ inu’?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: mamaha cu mamuhi’ ci ṟagu’ ṟagu’an ki.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: cel su’ hunco’?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: nel cu minnarang ci kaman wa. payux caṟung ka kaman, papuse’ cu ci use’ kira’ haṟi’ la.
ch: B:草太多了，我在砍草，等一下要澆水。
en: B:There’s too much grass, I’m cutting it, I’ll have to water it later.

ab: ita ka keweh lu lalabah mu haca?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: cel su’ puson inu’ aṟ?
ch: B:你放在哪裡呢?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: cel mu pacelun ci ka syaw na ot.
ch: A:放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: tinbulan su’ ka ṟaxal la?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎？
en: A: Have you turned over the soil?

ab: masu’ cu tumabul, pagaṟa’ cu la.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: tana’ halan kumit ka ṟagu’ pinmuhi’ su’ la?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: tana’ kutan ka tamana’ hani hiya’ la, ini’ ka ciyak hiya’ na.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的大黃瓜就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbages here are ready to harvest, but the cucumbers there are not yet ready to harvest.

ab: talagay ka ngahi’ kinehul su’ aṟ!
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: rogiy cu pusa’ kuhu’ ṟik aw?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: cel mamu’ hunco’?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: nel min pusa’ ci ṟakuk kakaṟak ci ucyux.
ch: B:我們在放漁網抓魚。
en: B: We’re releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: payux ka ucyux sani aw?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: payux ka ucyux kinṟak cel cika kobu’ la.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: yo mamu’ na inu’ kunṟak ci ucyux?
ch: A:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: as cu usa’ meta’ ci ucyux kung.
ch: B:我都用魚叉射魚。
en: B: I shoot fish with a spear.

ab: ba’ su’ mulata’ na panelu’?
ch: A:你會用弓箭打獵嗎?
en: A: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

ab: kunṟak cu na binong, kung. ga, tagit cu maras ci huṟil lu hapuy musa’ muloṟak.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: tu’uy pinkakayan na baṟok nanahi’ hani.
ch: A:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: hunco’ su’ ba’un?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: papak na baṟok ka hani, kani ka tu’uy naha.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: yona cel tunruṟi’ ci asinuw ka binong ta’ la, hali’ ta’ matox.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: hunco’ su’ ba’un?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: yona wal sunkanux ka huṟil la, ululi ta’ musa’.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: amol ka nel su’ sabale’an?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: katu’ sinbale’ na uṟati’ kani, kakaṟak ci olit.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: amol ka cel su’ pusan saca hiya’?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: binong tatiruṟi’ ci papak kani, kakaṟak ci para’.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: talagay payux ka bini’ na amutux itan soni.’
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: ho’ wa, hali’ ta’ pasa’un mani’ ci raral alang.
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let’s take it back to the tribe and share it!
